text_original: I enjoy it. rpg chats are nice, in my opinion. Even allowing me to look at past conversations now, which I find EXTREMELY nice. I definitely like it a lot! I want to give it half a star more if I could. I genuinely love using this app. there are new models, which I find nice, but I really hope the old ones aren't leaving. I enjoy the old models immensely.
text_zh: 我很享受其中。在我看来，RPG聊天很棒。现在甚至能让我查看过去的对话，我觉得这简直太棒了。我绝对非常喜欢它！如果可以的话，我想再多给它半颗星。我是真心喜欢用这个软件。这里有一些新模型，我觉得挺不错的，但我真的希望旧模型不要下线。我超级喜欢那些旧模型。
reply_original: Thank you for the amazing update! We are so glad you love the chat history feature. Don't worry, we have no plans to remove the old models you enjoy so much. Your support means everything to us! If you ever have any questions or feedback, feel free to reach out to us at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun chatting!
reply_zh: 感谢您的精彩更新！我们非常高兴您喜欢聊天记录功能。请放心，我们没有计划移除您非常喜爱的旧模型。您的支持对我们至关重要！如果您有任何问题或反馈，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝您聊天愉快！
